headline: STERIS Appoints Pierre Boulud to Board of Directors
summary: DUBLIN, IRELAND, May 07, 2026 -- STERIS plc announced today that, effective May 5, 2026, Pierre Boulud has been appointed to the Board of Directors. “We are pleased to welcome Pierre to our...

headline: NeuroPace (NPCE) Moves 6.3% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: NeuroPace (NPCE) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
